{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230123373B8243CC0EC0FF7F30B4"}"},"total":109},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618958543013937944","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟
孙悟空大战几百回合。但是薛宝钗的确太强
了。要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头
台。这波m4六倍扫射必死，除此之外。我比较
欣赏诸葛亮对花果山108只猴子说的一句话“小
伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前罢谱”表现出诸葛亮
对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨。总而言之,此书情
节有趣。","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":21,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774200217FF7F30B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618958543013937944%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227599286034311941145%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773929051,"group_id":"7599286034311941145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我们未知拂袖何方，我们唯有彻夜前行","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0q+sgTWu0HPzhJfFQLqwRI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/495feb0230b740a4b23daa2e438324f5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793904&x-signature=AuaEjIA0kpQNkxUnUk6UKrXjtKE%3D","user_id":"9600000117","user_name":"问君天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"9600000117","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599286034311941145","book_info":{"abstract":"李清虚穿越洪荒，成为了普普通通的后天人族。
无修为、无法宝的他要面对着即将到来的妖族屠人，可谓是天崩开局。
好在系统激活，他成为了万界聊天群的群主，群成员则是来自诸天万界的天命之子。
他可通过红包向群成员发放红包，而群成员向他献祭宝物，则最低可获得万倍暴击！
虽然李清虚身上没有什么宝物，但对于其他世界来说，洪荒的一草一木都是难以想象的至宝！
【叶黑：感谢群主大大赐下的神水助我突破四极境，觉醒先天圣体道胎！】
【黑大污：天道筑基是什么乐色，小爷我可是大道筑基！】
【肖炎：三天河东，三天河西，莫欺少年穷，桀桀桀……】
【伍六七：刺客首领？颗秒！】
李清虚赐予洪荒世界之物给群成员，助他们完成蜕变，而群成员也献祭各种宝物让他逆天改命。
【群成员叶黑献祭龙纹黑金剑，触发百万倍暴击，蜕变为上品先天灵宝赤霄剑！】
【群成员肖炎献祭骨灵冷火，触发百万倍暴击，蜕变为太阳真火！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f59fbc13ac7d4c1f1ef94ed4292f5963","author":"斧头帮琛哥","author_id":"","book_id":"7599286034311941145","book_name":"开局聊天群，到诸天主角降临洪荒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599286081082622489","read_count":"102100","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"368113"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"171","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/63e37567479cea45c82ebf316da3db45~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384217&x-signature=6hoLQaxG6fHRXWrUsBeswLckQ1w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2762441008886859","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"115"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230123373B8243CC0EC0FF7F30B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读53分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0
